summary: Completed iteration 4 testing of Phase 4-6 features: messaging, HR documents, schedules, payroll with Swiss software exports, analytics dashboard, and subscriptions. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (after fixing WinBiz export bug). Frontend: All 5 new pages load and function correctly.

fixed_during_testing.issue: 500 error due to invalid character '/' in Excel sheet title

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic only

seed_data_creation: Created test conversations, messages, and documents via pytest (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 4-6 features verified working: messaging (conversations CRUD, send/receive messages), HR documents (create, list, filter by category), schedules (create, list), payroll (variables API, Cresus CSV export, Abacus XML export, WinBiz Excel export), analytics (KPI cards, monthly hours chart, project hours, location distribution), subscriptions (3 plans: Basic/Pro/Enterprise). Frontend pages: Messagerie (conversation list, chat area), Dossier RH (category chips, document cards), Paie (summary cards, export buttons, employee table), Analytique (KPIs, bar charts, distribution charts), Abonnement (plan cards with features). Sidebar shows 19+ menu items for admin role.

backend.api_payroll_variables: PASS - GET /api/payroll/variables returns employee payroll data
backend.api_analytics_dashboard: PASS - Returns monthly data, project hours, location distribution

frontend.analytics_kpi_cards: PASS - Employes, Projets actifs, Heures ce mois, Taux absenteisme

frontend.sidebar_menu_items: PASS - 19/19 menu items visible for admin

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: openpyxl library doesn't allow '/' character in Excel sheet titles
evidence: ValueError: Invalid character / found in sheet title at server.py line 2449
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Reran pytest - all 19 tests pass including WinBiz export
